nodes.name: 佩里哈山脈
nodes.summary: 佩里哈山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联48种鸟类，包括Band-tailed guan、紫冠雉、Black-fronted wood quail等48种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-naped greenlet
nodes.summary: Rufous-naped greenlet（Rufous-naped greenlet，学名 Pachysylvia semibrunnea），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is known from "numerous specimens" in Venezuela, considered "fairly common" in Colombia, and is "uncommon and local" in Ecuador. The rufous-naped greenlet is found in a few protected areas and "has a medium sensitivity to human disturbance"
